name: smart-hostel-management-system
description: Smart Hostel Management System root package

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && chmod +x ./frontend/node_modules/.bin/vite && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
